title: Tri City Monsters
description:
In TCM, meet Mori (fly-by-night party punk), Amir (lithe, conniving socialite), and Akello (certified DILF)- three mostly-normal, hot men who find themselves embroiled in the supernatural.  Choose which path to pursue as you uncover their real demonic natures, catch feelings, and get busy with them at your discretion.  The city's a dangerous place, however, and even worse things are lurking in grungy alleys to catch you (and your beau) off guard.

Explore each character's struggles in pursuit of their goals in further upcoming chapters, set to release regularly.

What does it mean to be human? In Tri City Monsters you'll come face to face with the answers. Mori, Amir, and Akello all lead very separate lives with their own problems but they all have one thing in common: they've traded their humanity for power but they all got more than they bargained for- and with some greater power making moves from the shadows, the dangers are a lot higher than any of them anticipated. 

Help them cope with what's happened to them- by embracing their new demonic forms or by holding on to their humanity, the choice is yours- and maybe forge a deep and permanent connection. In one form or another. 

 

• Choose your name and pronouns

• Choose your body type for sex scenes --> Whether the player is described as having a penis, vagina, or a mystery :)

• Stream-safe audio

• CGs + Gallery for each character

• Rich, hand-drawn artwork and illustrations 

• Spicy scenes with both the human and monster forms.

TCM contains explicit 18+ content and a lot of kinky material!  In addition to general content warnings, please note the story has elements of:

• Alcohol and drug use

• Implied but not always explicit consent

• Weird monster anatomy

• Elements of mind control, with consent (in Amir's route only)

• Threats of bodily harm from antagonist characters towards the MC

• Sex Work/Prostitution (Amir is a luxury escort)

• Artificial/Temporary biology changes

• Some feral/primal

• Double Penetration
description_short: Tri City Monsters is a supernatural, monsterlovin' visual novel where you can romance and/or de-pants 3 demonic love interests. Navigate a dangerous urban jungle with their help and maybe you'll get a taste of what it means to be a monster.
